properties.name: Industrial Standpipe
properties.nearbyIntersection: Hanley Ave and N Carrington Ln
properties.ownerOperator: City of Coeur d'Alene Water Department
properties.serviceRole: Provides enhanced storage, reserve capacity, and fire-flow support for the Upper Pressure Zone; the Upper Zone can also supply the General Pressure Zone via PRVs.
properties.constructedNote: 2012 water plan says 1999; 2018 council minutes say 2000.
publicNotes: Light blue cylindrical steel standpipe visible from public roadway.
Working note: city records found during research describe the tank as serving the Upper Pressure Zone, but the direct city PDF URLs need accessible replacements.
Telecom equipment is co-located on the structure; public map omits operational details.

sources.label: City of Coeur d'Alene 2012 Water System Comprehensive Plan Update (public URL needed)
